data.title: Microsoft Poaches Top DeepMind AI Talent Behind Google's Podcasting Feature—Mustafa Suleyman's Zurich AI Lab Expands
data.description: Microsoft has recruited top talent from Google DeepMind for its AI lab in Zurich. This includes Marco Tagliasacchi, Zalán Borsos, and Matthias Minderer, as part of a strategic move by Mustafa Suleyman to improve the company's capabilities in AI development.

data.title: Jensen Huang Once Wrote A Desperate Letter To Save Nvidia But Also Forged A Partnership Worth Billions With TSMC: Morris Chang Reveals The Story
data.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang once sent a desperate letter to TSMC founder Morris Chang in 1997, seeking a lifeline for his struggling company—a bold move that not only saved Nvidia from bankruptcy but also forged a multi-billion-dollar partnership that now powers the AI revolution.

data.title: Cathie Wood Sells Palantir Shares As Rally Cools Down, Ark Invest Also Dumps Nearly $7 Million Worth Of Robinhood Stock
data.description: On Wednesday, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made significant trades involving Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) and Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD).

data.title: Google Joins Meta, Amazon In Winding Up DEI Hiring — Memo Reveals Details
data.description: Google has decided to eliminate its DEI hiring targets, citing obligations as a federal contractor and recent court rulings, joining other major tech companies like Meta and Amazon in scaling back diversity initiatives.

data.title: TRUMP Meme Coin Jumps 4.27%, Outpaces Bitcoin, Ethereum And Dogecoin, But It's Still No Where Near January Highs
data.description: The Official TRUMP (TRUMP) coin has surged 4.27% in the last 24 hours, reaching $18.50, with a market cap of $3.7 billion. Despite this short-term rally, TRUMP remains down 75.36% from its all-time high of $75.35 set on Jan. 19.
